label: Iterative Chain
description: Six fairness and governance dimensions run sequentially, each preserving cumulative audit context from previous stages.

stages.label: Data Fairness
stages.purpose: Assess fair and representative training and evaluation data coverage, group definitions, and group-wise fairness targets.

stages.label: Adaptive Progression Integrity
stages.purpose: Evaluate adaptive fairness, early-warning threshold validation, progression transparency, and pedagogical constraints.

stages.label: Protected Attribute Governance
stages.purpose: Audit protected-attribute and proxy handling, fairness mitigation validation, and separation between decisioning and fairness-evaluation paths.

stages.label: Cultural and Accessibility Equity
stages.purpose: Review cultural inclusivity, non-exclusionary language, and accessibility support in learner-facing code and interfaces.

stages.label: Explainability and Human Oversight
stages.purpose: Evaluate AI output explainability, analytics claim validity, prediction-use alignment, contestability, and review safeguards.

stages.label: Privacy and Consent
stages.purpose: Assess learner privacy protection with consent checks, revocation handling, access controls, and compliance-oriented safeguards.
